description: Pattern-matching and action wrapping for server components.

elements.name: matchResult calls ok handler on Ok

steps.name: an Ok result with value "hello"
I call matchResult with ok handler returning length and err handler returning -1
the output is 5

elements.name: matchResult calls err handler on Err

steps.name: an Err result with error "fail"
I call matchResult with ok handler returning length and err handler returning -1
the output is -1

elements.name: matchResultAsync resolves Ok handler on Ok

steps.name: a ResultAsync.ok("data")
I call matchResultAsync with ok handler returning uppercase and err handler returning "fallback"
the output is "DATA"

elements.name: matchResultAsync resolves Err handler on Err

steps.name: a ResultAsync.err("oops")
I call matchResultAsync with ok handler returning uppercase and err handler returning "fallback"
the output is "fallback"

elements.name: matchOption calls some handler on Some

steps.name: a Some option with value "Alice"
I call matchOption with some handler returning greeting and none handler returning "Guest"
the output is "Hello, Alice"

elements.name: matchOption calls none handler on None

steps.name: a None option
I call matchOption with some handler returning greeting and none handler returning "Guest"
the output is "Guest"
a resultAction wrapping a doubling function
I execute the action with argument 21
the result is Ok with value 42
a resultAction wrapping a throwing function
I execute the action with argument "bad"
the result is Err

name: Server Utilities

description: Bridge Result-returning functions to TanStack Query and SWR.

steps.name: a ResultAsync-returning function that succeeds with "hello"
I wrap it with toQueryFn and call it
the output resolves to "hello"
a ResultAsync-returning function that fails with "boom"
I wrap it with toQueryFn and call it
the output rejects with "boom"
a ResultAsync-returning function that succeeds with "alice"
I call toQueryOptions with a query key
the output has the expected queryKey
the queryFn resolves to "alice"
a ResultAsync mutation function that succeeds
I wrap it with toMutationFn and call it with "alice"
the output resolves to "saved: alice"
a ResultAsync mutation function that fails
I wrap it with toMutationFn and call it with "alice"
the output rejects with "fail"

elements.name: toMutationOptions returns mutationFn that resolves with Ok value

steps.name: a ResultAsync mutation function that succeeds
I wrap it with toMutationOptions and call it with "bob"
the output resolves to "saved: bob"

elements.name: toMutationOptions returns mutationFn that throws Err value

steps.name: a ResultAsync mutation function that fails
I wrap it with toMutationOptions and call it with "bob"
the output rejects with "fail"
a key-based ResultAsync function that succeeds
I wrap it with toSwrFetcher and call it with "users"
the output resolves to "data-users"
a key-based ResultAsync function that fails
I wrap it with toSwrFetcher and call it with "users"
the output rejects with "not found"

name: Adapters

description: Client-side utility functions for wrapping async actions.

elements.name: fromAction wraps successful async function in Ok

steps.name: an async function that returns "success"
I wrap it with fromAction and call it
the result is Ok with value "success"

elements.name: fromAction wraps throwing async function in Err

steps.name: an async function that throws "failure"
I wrap it with fromAction and call it
the result is Err with error "failure"
an async function accepting name and age
I wrap it with fromAction and call it with "Alice" and 30
the result is Ok with value containing name "Alice" and age 30

name: Utilities

description: Renders Ok or Err branch based on Result variant.

elements.name: Match renders ok branch for Ok result

steps.name: a React tree with Match and an Ok result "Alice"
the rendered output contains "Hello, Alice"

elements.name: Match renders err branch for Err result

steps.name: a React tree with Match and an Err result "not found"
the rendered output contains "Error: not found"

elements.name: Match updates when result changes from Ok to Err

steps.name: a React tree with Match and an Ok result "Bob"
the rendered output contains "Hello, Bob"

name: Match Component

description: Hooks for eager and lazy async Result operations.

steps.name: a useResultAsync hook with a function returning Ok "data"
the async operation resolves
the hook result is Ok with value "data"
isLoading is false
a useResultAsync hook with a function returning Err "fail"
the async operation resolves
the hook result is Err with error "fail"

elements.name: useResultAction starts idle and executes on demand

steps.name: a useResultAction hook with a function returning Ok "done"
the hook result is undefined
I execute the action
the hook result is Ok with value "done"
a useResultSuspense hook inside Suspense with Ok "loaded"
the async operation resolves
the hook result is Ok with value "loaded"
a createResultResource with Ok "cached"
I preload the resource
the async operation resolves
reading the resource returns Ok with value "cached"

name: Async Hooks

description: Hooks for managing, composing, and transitioning Result state.

elements.name: useResult starts undefined with no initial value

steps.name: a useResult hook with no initial value
the hook result is undefined
a useResult hook with no initial value
I call setOk with "hello"
the hook result is Ok with value "hello"
a useResult hook with no initial value
I call setErr with "bad"
the hook result is Err with error "bad"
a useResult hook with no initial value
I call setOk with "temp"
I call reset
the hook result is undefined
a useOptimisticResult hook with authoritative Ok "confirmed"
the hook result is Ok with value "confirmed"
a useOptimisticResult hook with authoritative Ok "confirmed"
I apply optimistic value "optimistic"
the hook result is Ok with value "optimistic"
a useResultTransition hook
the hook result is undefined
a useResultTransition hook
I start a transition returning Ok "transitioned"
the hook result is Ok with value "transitioned"
a useSafeTry hook yielding Ok "a" and Ok "b"
the hook result is Ok with value "ab"
a useSafeTry hook yielding Ok "a" then Err "fail"
the hook result is Err with error "fail"

name: Composition Hooks
